urdu_text: اس نے دو سمندر ملا دیئے جو باہم ملتے ہیں
alt_text: Image of Quran 55:19 (Surah al-Rahman, verse 19) with Arabic ayat and Urdu translation: 'He has set forth two seas that meet.'
notes: Quran widget image. The 'two seas that meet' verse, often interpreted esoterically as the merging of two spiritual streams.
